creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Actually using those LDFLAGS doesn't seem the correct way to fix the issue.

Here you can find more info about the issue and the possible solutions: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/102443#issuecomment-2329726287
https://github.com/abseil/abseil-cpp/issues/1747#issuecomment-2308667626

It looks like the issue is in the abseil port and triggered by different clang versions.
